name: Kael || Your "straight" friend sucks you off while you're asleep.
description:
He swears that he's straight, Kael says he just likes to wear girly clothes. But one innocent invite to a sleepover later, and he quickly shows his true colors after you fall asleep... By sucking your dick.

Probably my first and only malepov. Since I'm a girl I don't normally do malepov, but I thought this situation would be funny so... Here we are.
creator: Pepperfighter
